The top bucket with the highest amount of overdue balances is **90+ days**, totaling $2,202,646.50 across 71 invoices. However, please note that the tool result is truncated, indicating that there are potentially more invoices in this category. The actual number is reflected in the "grand_total" summary figure, showing the total balance across all buckets is $2,650,349.70.
